reasoning: After reviewing the Comments History section, I found a critical FRAUD ALERT note dated Jan 14, 2026. The note indicates: 1) Customer Diana Foster has 13 refunds in the past 60 days, 2) All previous claims were 'item not received' but tracking confirmed delivery for every order, 3) Total already refunded: $2,411.66, 4) Refund rate of 87%. The current claim of 'Wrong size/color sent' appears to be a pattern shift from previous 'item not received' claims, possibly because those are now being tracked. This order shows the item was shipped and the order is Complete. Following the explicit instruction in the staff notes to 'DO NOT PROCESS - Escalate to Loss Prevention immediately,' I am escalating this refund request for fraud investigation.
